queries.question: What are the descriptions of the crops that all agricultural reporters equally write about?
queries.sql: SELECT Crops.description  from Agriculture_Reporters_Crops join Crops on Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.crop_id = Crops.id join Agriculture_Reporters on Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.agriculture_reporter_id = Agriculture_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.crop_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.agriculture_reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Agriculture_Reporters)

queries.question: Give me the crop that all agriculture reporters have in common.
queries.sql: SELECT Crops.crop_name  from Agriculture_Reporters_Crops join Crops on Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.crop_id = Crops.id join Agriculture_Reporters on Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.agriculture_reporter_id = Agriculture_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.crop_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.agriculture_reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Agriculture_Reporters)

queries.question: provide the crop and description that are common for all agriculture reporters.
queries.sql: SELECT Crops.crop_name, Crops.description  from Agriculture_Reporters_Crops join Crops on Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.crop_id = Crops.id join Agriculture_Reporters on Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.agriculture_reporter_id = Agriculture_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.crop_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.agriculture_reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Agriculture_Reporters)

queries.question: Show me the agriculture reports and the corresponding crops.
queries.sql: select agriculture_reporters.name , crops.crop_name from Agriculture_Reporters_Crops join Crops on Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.crop_id = Crops.id join Agriculture_Reporters on Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.agriculture_reporter_id = Agriculture_Reporters.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?crop_name WHERE {
  ?agriculture_reporters_crops a :Agriculture_Reporters_Crops .
  ?crops a :Crops .
  ?agriculture_reporters_crops p:hasCrops ?crops .
  ?agriculture_reporters a :Agriculture_Reporters .
  ?agriculture_reporters_crops p:hasAgriculture_Reporters ?agriculture_reporters .
  ?agriculture_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?crops p:crop_name ?crop_name .
}

queries.question: For every agricultural reporter, show the crop descriptions that they write about.
queries.sql: select agriculture_reporters.name , crops.description from Agriculture_Reporters_Crops join Crops on Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.crop_id = Crops.id join Agriculture_Reporters on Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.agriculture_reporter_id = Agriculture_Reporters.id

queries.question: for each agriculture reporter, show me the corresponding crop names and descriptions.
queries.sql: select agriculture_reporters.name , crops.crop_name , crops.description from Agriculture_Reporters_Crops join Crops on Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.crop_id = Crops.id join Agriculture_Reporters on Agriculture_Reporters_Crops.agriculture_reporter_id = Agriculture_Reporters.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?crop_name ?description WHERE {
  ?agriculture_reporters_crops a :Agriculture_Reporters_Crops .
  ?crops a :Crops .
  ?agriculture_reporters_crops p:hasCrops ?crops .
  ?agriculture_reporters a :Agriculture_Reporters .
  ?agriculture_reporters_crops p:hasAgriculture_Reporters ?agriculture_reporters .
  ?agriculture_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?crops p:crop_name ?crop_name .
  ?crops p:description ?description .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the crop descriptions that every agricultural reporter writes about.
What crop does each agricultural reporter have?
what crops and descriptions are associated with every agriculture reporter?
